docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Update Docker Compose file version to 3.8 to align with newer Docker Compose specifications.
Quote port mapping string to ensure valid YAML syntax and prevent potential parsing issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.7.4 to align with Java 11 support and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.3.x is EOL and may have compatibility issues or missing features required for the target environment; upgrading ensures stability and access to newer features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update project version to 2.0.0 to reflect the major upgrade.
Update description to reflect the new Spring Boot version.

pom.xml.why_exists: Older JWT versions may have security vulnerabilities or lack support for newer Java versions.
Older MapStruct versions may not be compatible with newer Java versions or Spring Boot versions.
Older Apache Commons versions may have security vulnerabilities or compatibility issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit Lombok version to rely on Spring Boot's managed version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot manages Lombok versions; specifying an older version can lead to compatibility issues.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Update Swagger UI endpoint patterns to match OpenAPI 3.0 paths.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The old /v2/api-docs and /swagger-resources paths are for Swagger 2.0; OpenAPI 3.0 uses /v3/api-docs and /swagger-ui. Without this change, the security configuration blocks access to the new documentation endpoints.
The field and method using UserDetailsServiceImpl were removed, leaving this import unused.
The globalUserDetails method using AuthenticationManagerBuilder was removed, leaving this import unused.
The class no longer extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter, leaving this import unused.
The globalUserDetails method using BCryptPasswordEncoder was removed, leaving this import unused.
The globalUserDetails method annotated with @Autowired was removed, leaving this import unused.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Switch configuration property binding from @Value annotations to @ConfigurationProperties for cleaner and type-safe property injection.
Rename legacy field names to match new property keys or naming conventions (e.g., licence to appLicense, contactEmail to contactMail).
Remove manual global header parameter configuration which is replaced by explicit SecurityScheme definition in OpenAPI 3.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Add explicit Bearer JWT security scheme and requirement to the OpenAPI definition.
Add Lombok RequiredArgsConstructor annotation to enable constructor injection.
Remove extraneous whitespace inside the log message format string.
